_metadata.name: Kyte-Doolittle Hydropathy scale
_metadata.source: Kyte, J. & Doolittle, R.F. (1982). A simple method for displaying the hydropathic character of a protein. J Mol Biol 157:105-132. doi:10.1016/0022-2836(82)90515-0
_metadata.description: Hydropathy index combining hydrophobicity and hydrophilicity. Used by Haig & Hurst (1991) and Wnetrzak et al. (2018). Distance = |KD_i - KD_j|. Range -4.5 (Arg, most hydrophilic) to 4.5 (Ile, most hydrophobic).
